title: Crocus Appears Inside Laboon
description: On pages 2–5, crocus appears inside laboon as inside the whale, the crew meets Crocus and begins to understand Laboon’s pain and strange living arrangements.
scene: Crocus Appears Inside Laboon. Inside the whale, the crew meets Crocus and begins to understand Laboon’s pain and strange living arrangements. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's a flower!

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: A flower!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Wait, no! It's a person

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That old man took out that giant squid with one blow!

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: ...Was he just fishing or did he do that to save us?

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: What's with him...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Say some- thing!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I-1-IF IT'S A FIGHT YOU WANT, T-THEN YOU'VE GOT ONE!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: We have a cannon on our side!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: don't, or someone might end up dead...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: 04? And just who would that be...?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: me.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Now, now, don't get so worked up.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Hey old man. Would you mind telling us just who you are,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And just where this place exactly is?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: that gramps thinks he can make a fool out of me...!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's common courtesy to introduce yourself before asking others questions, you know?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Oh right...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Sorry about that.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: My name is CroCus, the lighthouse keeper of twin capes.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: I'm 71 years old, a gemini, and type AB blood.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Nobody minds if I kill him, right!?

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Calm down.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: You're wondering where this place is? You first trespass in my private resort and then start mouthing off with that attitude!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Does this place look like the stomach of a mouse!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: s... so then we really must've been swallowed by a whale.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What do we do...!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: I don't wanna be digested!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: If it's an exit you want, it's right over there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: You can get out of here!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Why is there an exit inside a whale's stomach?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And how is it that a door's floating in the sky?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: No wait... If you look carefully, the skies,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: And the clouds...

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: ARE ALL JUST A PAINTING...!

dialogue.speaker: Miss Goldenweek
dialogue.text: The inside of the whale's stomach has been painted over!

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: That's just my way of having a good time.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Just what the heck are you doing in here anyways!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Just leave him be. We've found an exit so let's just get out of here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: What's that!?

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on crocus appears inside laboon. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
